an3.120:1.3: Bodily purity, verbal purity, & mental purity.
an3.120:1.5: There is the case where a certain person abstains from taking life, abstains from theft, abstains from sexual misconduct.
an3.120:2.2: There is the case where a certain person abstains from telling lies, abstains from divisive speech, abstains from harsh speech, abstains from idle chatter.
an3.120:3.2: There is the case where a certain person is one who is not covetous, is one whose mind is devoid of ill will, and is one with right view.
an3.120:3.4: These, monks, are the three purities.”
